scope: public repository files and commit metadata only
privacy_boundary: Excludes raw private chat, health and pet-health material, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads.

records.title: A workflow rewriter is implemented while authoritative workflow integration remains unresolved

sources.meaning: adds verifier that classifies authoritative workflow wiring

records.summary: The repository contains a tested mechanism capable of wiring atomic evidence finalization into the Cloudflare workflow, but the authoritative workflow was still classified as not wired. Capability-to-change and applied-change are separate states.
unresolved: Apply the rewriter to the authoritative workflow and verify the committed workflow before claiming integration.
records.review_route: Inspect the three commits and verify that utility existence, wiring verification, and actual workflow mutation remain separately evidenced.

records.title: Repeated-trial inference now requires preregistered ledger integrity

sources.meaning: completes fixed-sample repeated acoustic trial gate
adds preregistered tamper-evident acoustic trial ledger
records R-041 completion and integration requirement

records.summary: R-040's statistical gate remains a valid component, but its interpretation is constrained by R-041: evaluation should occur only after frozen protocol verification and complete tamper-evident ledger validation. The later artifact narrows the conditions for a trustworthy claim rather than erasing the earlier implementation.
unresolved: Integrate ledger verification into the browser challenge harness and retain an external digest attestation.
records.review_route: Inspect the three commits and reject this record if R-041 does not gate evaluation or if R-040 already enforced equivalent protocol and ledger integrity.
